x-enumeration-literals.name: Device Issuance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides customers with devices such as debit cards, credit cards, prepaid cards, or digital tokens.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Activation & Personalization Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Activates devices for use and personalizes them with customer-specific information or security credentials.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Lifecycle Management Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks the device through stages: issued, active, suspended, revoked, expired, or replaced.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security & Authentication Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures secure usage, including PIN setup, encryption, biometric authentication, and fraud prevention.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Replacement & Renewal Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Manages device replacement for lost, stolen, or expired devices.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Support Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides assistance for device-related issues, including activation, deactivation, and troubleshooting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Usage Monitoring Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Monitors transactions, limits, and device usage to ensure compliance and detect anomalies.
